zh.lifeSummary: 當Ryurik Ii Rostisalvich Grand Duke Of Kiev於1142年出生在烏克蘭ЖитомирськаОвруцький район時，他的父親Mystislaw von Pleskau32歲，母親Eufemia Premyslovna32歲。他於1162年與Princess Of The Cumans在蘇聯烏克蘭ЖитомирськаОвруцький район結婚。他去世在亞西婭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ryurik Ii Rostisalvich Grand Duke Of Kiev于1142年出生在乌克兰ЖитомирськаОвруцький район时，他的父亲Mystislaw von Pleskau32岁，母亲Eufemia Premyslovna32岁。他于1162年与Princess Of The Cumans在苏联乌克兰ЖитомирськаОвруцький район结婚。他去世在亞西婭。

Ovruch Raion, Zhytomyr, Ukraine, Soviet Union

nameMeanings.name: Kiev
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Helmut, Kurt.
North German: probably a nickname for a quarrelsome person, from Middle Low German kīf ‘quarrel’.

nameMeanings.name: Ryurik
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse Hrodrik ‘fame rule’ ( see Roderick ); the name of a Scandinavian leader who established the city of Novgorod in the 9th-century.

nameMeanings.name: Ii
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

nameMeanings.name: Grand
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, common in Scotland, where it is the name of a famous clan. It is derived from a nickname meaning ‘large’ (Anglo-Norman grand). In the United States the name is sometimes bestowed in honour of the Civil War general and 18th president, Ulysses S. Grant ( 1822–85 ).

nameMeanings.name: Duke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: In modern use this normally represents a coinage parallel to   Earl   and   King  , but it has been used as a short form of   Marmaduke   from at least the early 1600s.

nameMeanings.name: Of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Ryurik Ii Rostisalvich Grand Duke Of Kiev was born in 1142, in Ovruch Raion, Zhytomyr, Ukraine, his father, Mystislaw von Pleskau, was 32 and his mother, Eufemia Premyslovna, was 32. He married Princess Of The Cumans in 1162, in Ovruch Raion, Zhytomyr, Ukraine, Soviet Union. He died in Asia.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ryurik Ii Rostisalvich Grand Duke Of Kiev est né en 1142, à Ovrutsʹkyy Rayon, Schytomyr, Ukraine, son père, Mystislaw von Pleskau, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Eufemia Premyslovna, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Princess Of The Cumans en 1162, à Ovrutsʹkyy Rayon, Schytomyr, Ukraine, Union soviétique. Il est décédé à L'Asie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ryurik Ii Rostisalvich Grand Duke Of Kiev 1142 in Ovrutsʹkyy Rayon, Schytomyr, Ukraine geboren wurde, war sein Vater Mystislaw von Pleskau 32 und seine Mutter Eufemia Premyslovna 32. Er hat 1162 in Ovrutsʹkyy Rayon, Schytomyr, Ukraine, Sowjetunion Princess Of The Cumans geheiratet. Er starb in L'Asie.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ryurik Ii Rostisalvich Grand Duke Of Kiev è nato il nel 1142 nel Ovrutsʹkyy Rayon, Schytomyr, Ucraina, il suo padre, Mystislaw von Pleskau, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Eufemia Premyslovna, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Princess Of The Cumans nel 1162, nel Ovrutsʹkyy Rayon, Schytomyr, Ucraina, Sowjetunion. Morì nel L'Asie.

ja.lifeSummary: Ryurik Ii Rostisalvich Grand Duke Of Kievが1142年にウクライナЖитомирськаОвруцький районで生まれた時，父Mystislaw von Pleskauは32歳，母Eufemia Premyslovnaは32歳であった。1162年にソビエト連邦ウクライナЖитомирськаОвруцький районでPrincess Of The Cumansと結婚した。彼はアシアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ryurik Ii Rostisalvich Grand Duke Of Kiev(이)가 1142년 우크라이나 Житомирська Овруцький район에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Mystislaw von Pleskau(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Eufemia Premyslovna(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1162년 소련 우크라이나 Житомирська Овруцький район에서 Princess Of The Cumans(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 아샤에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ryurik Ii Rostisalvich Grand Duke Of Kiev nasceu em 1142, em Ovrutsʹkyy Rayon, Schytomyr, Ucrânia, seu pai, Mystislaw von Pleskau, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Eufemia Premyslovna, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Princess Of The Cumans em 1162, em Ovrutsʹkyy Rayon, Schytomyr, Ucrânia, Sowjetunion. Ele faleceu em L'Asie.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ryurik Ii Rostisalvich Grand Duke Of Kiev родился в 1142 г. в местности Овручский район, Житомирская, Украина, его отцу по имени Mystislaw von Pleskau было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Eufemia Premyslovna, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Princess Of The Cumans в 1162 г. в местности Овручский район, Житомирская, Украина, Советский Союз. Он умер в местности ася.

Se casó con Princess Of The Cumans en 1162, en Ovrutsʹkyy Rayon, Schytomyr, Ucrania, Unión Soviética. Murió en Asia.
